privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.subtitle: Your privacy is important to us
privacyPolicy.questions: Do you have questions about our privacy policy?
privacyPolicy.contactMessage: We are committed to protecting your data and resolving any concerns.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: Global Mantenimiento C.A. ("we", "our company" or "Global Mantenimiento") is committed to protecting the privacy of users of our website {{companyDomain}}. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your information when you visit our website. By accessing or using our website, you agree to the practices described in this policy.

informationCollected.title: Information We Collect
informationCollected.content:
As an informational website, we collect only the following data:

• Browser and device information: browser type, operating system, IP address, device type, and anonymous cookie identifiers.

• Usage information: pages visited, time spent on site, clicked links, and anonymous browsing behavior.

• Cookies: we use essential cookies for site functionality and anonymous analytics cookies to improve our website. We do not collect personally identifiable information such as name, email, or phone number through this informational website.

useOfInformation.title: How We Use Your Information
useOfInformation.content:
The information collected is used to:

• Analyze website usage and improve user experience.

• Detect and prevent malicious activity or security violations.

• Comply with applicable legal and regulatory obligations.

• Generate anonymous statistics about website traffic.

We do not sell, rent, or share your information with third parties for marketing purposes.

cookies.title: Cookies and Similar Technologies
cookies.content:
We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience on our website:

• Essential cookies: required for basic site functionality, such as maintaining your session and remembering your preferences.

• Analytics cookies: help us understand how visitors interact with the website, allowing us to continuously improve.

• You can disable cookies through your browser settings. However, some site features may not work properly without cookies.

thirdPartyServices.title: Third-Party Services
thirdPartyServices.content:
Our website may use the following third-party services:

• Google Analytics: to analyze website usage anonymously. You can learn more about Google's privacy practices in their privacy policy.

• Hosting providers: to store and serve website content.

These third parties have their own privacy policies and data handling practices.

dataProtection.title: Data Protection Measures
dataProtection.content:
We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your information:

• Secure connections via HTTPS protocol.

• Regular monitoring of our systems to detect vulnerabilities.

• Data storage on secure servers with restricted access.

• Data retention policies to remove unnecessary information.

Although we take reasonable measures to protect your information, no method of Internet transmission or electronic storage is 100% secure.

userRights.title: Your Rights
userRights.content:
As a user of our website, you have the following rights:

• Right of access: you can request information about the data we collect.

• Right to correction: you can request correction of inaccurate data.

• Right to deletion: you can request deletion of your data (when applicable).

• Right to object: you can reject the processing of your data for analytical purposes.

• Right to disable cookies: you can configure your browser to reject all cookies.

To exercise any of these rights, contact us using the information provided below.

childrenPrivacy.title: Children's Privacy
childrenPrivacy.content: Our website is directed to a general audience and is not specifically designed to attract minors. We do not deliberately collect personal information from children under 13. If we discover that we have collected information from a minor, we will take steps to delete such information from our records.

policyChanges.title: Changes to This Policy
policyChanges.content:
We may occasionally update this Privacy Policy to reflect changes in our practices or for operational, legal, or regulatory reasons. Any significant changes will be communicated through a prominent notice on our website. The "Last Updated" date at the top of this policy indicates when the last change was made.

We recommend that you review this Privacy Policy periodically to stay informed about how we protect your information.
